sanskrit: तमेव शरणं गच्छ सर्वभावेन भारत । तत्प्रसादात्परां शान्तिं स्थानं प्राप्स्यसि शाश्वतम् ॥
hindiTranslation: हे भरतवंशोद्भव अर्जुन  तू सर्वभावसे उस ईश्वरकी ही शरणमें चला जा ।  उसकी कृपासे तू परमशान्तिसंसारसे सर्वथा उपरति को और अविनाशी परमपदको प्राप्त हो जायगा ॥
englishTranslation: Surrender to the divine with your whole being, Arjuna. By that grace, you will reach supreme peace and the eternal abode.
essence: Wholehearted surrender opens the door to lasting peace.
speaker: Krishna
simpleMeaning: Give yourself entirely to the divine, and you will receive deep peace and the eternal home beyond change.
simpleInsight: It can feel relieving to stop carrying everything alone and let grace do what effort cannot.
detailedMeaning: On the battlefield, Arjuna is frozen between duty and grief. Krishna has already shown him the hidden order behind action, mind, and devotion. Now he gives the final turn: not struggle, but complete refuge in the divine.
modernRelevance: You are standing at a hospital corridor, unable to fix what is happening inside the room. At some point, clenched control becomes exhaustion; this verse points to the release of handing the burden over.
translationLiteral: तमेव (to that alone) / शरणं (refuge) / गच्छ (go) / सर्वभावेन (with all your being) / भारत (O descendant of Bharata) / तत्प्रसादात् (by that grace) / परां (supreme) / शान्तिं (peace) / स्थानं (abode) / प्राप्स्यसि (you will attain) / शाश्वतम् (eternal)
